auth.accountCreated: Account created successfully! Please check your email to confirm your account.
auth.accountConfirmed: Account confirmed successfully! You can now sign in.
auth.accountFailed: Account creation failed, please try again.
auth.errorFetchingSession: Error fetching session, please refresh the page.
auth.passwordRecoverySuccess: A password reset email has been sent to your email address.
auth.passwordRecoveryError: Error resetting password, please try again.

placeholders.enterResetCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your email

errors.email: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Please enter your credentials to access your account.

errors.invalidCredentials: Unable to sign in with these credentials.

signUp.heroSubtitle: Developed by CONAFOHD, KOLData centralizes data from Congolese NGOs to strengthen local autonomy and ensure secure coordination.
signUp.heroDescription: We promote digital sovereignty to foster localization of humanitarian response and sustainably transform the ecosystem in DRC.
signUp.heroStats: CONAFOHD RDC represents more than 500 organizations across 5 regional forums: FONAHD, CCONAT, RONHD, FONAHI and RHONA.
signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.subtitle: Join the reference platform for local data.
signUp.passwordHint: Minimum 8 characters, including numbers and symbols.
signUp.agreeToTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a secure reset code.

errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while sending reset code.

checkEmail.confirmDescription: We sent a confirmation link to {email}.
checkEmail.resetDescription: We sent a password reset code to {email}.

instructions.title: How to reset your password
instructions.description: You can either click the link in the email or enter the 6-digit code below:
instructions.step1: Open the email we sent to your inbox
instructions.step2: Enter the 6-digit code from the email (or click the reset link)
instructions.step3: Create your new password on the next page

errors.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Please check and try again.

status.sent: A new email has been sent.

confirmAccount.title: Confirm your account
confirmAccount.subtitle: A confirmation code was sent to {email}.

oauthConsent.title: Connect {client}
oauthConsent.requestingAccess: is requesting access to your Kongo Local Data account.
oauthConsent.disclaimer: By clicking Allow Access, you agree to the third-party application's terms. You can revoke access later in your account settings.

errors.oauthUnavailable: Supabase OAuth API is not available on this client.
errors.stateMismatch: Your session has expired. Please restart the OAuth authorization process.
